mapper.select: select sensor_id from sensor_data_float group by sensor_id
select metric_name from sensor_data_float group by metric_name
select sensor_id from sensor_data_string group by sensor_id
select * from sensor_data_float where obs_timestamp between ((select extract(epoch from now())) - #{intervalInMin}*60) and (select extract(epoch from now())) and sensor_id = #{sensorId}
select * from sensor_data_string where obs_timestamp between ((select extract(epoch from now())) - #{intervalInMin}*60) and (select extract(epoch from now())) and sensor_id = #{sensorId}

SELECT COALESCE ( C.MONTH, d.MONTH ) AS MONTH, COALESCE ( C.record_count, 0 ) + COALESCE ( d.record_count, 0 ) AS record FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR( TIMESTAMP 'epoch' + obs_timestamp * INTERVAL '1 second', 'YYYY-MM' ) AS MONTH, COUNT ( * ) AS record_count FROM sensor_data_float GROUP BY MONTH ORDER BY MONTH DESC ) C FULL JOIN ( SELECT TO_CHAR( TIMESTAMP 'epoch' + obs_timestamp * INTERVAL '1 second', 'YYYY-MM' ) AS MONTH, COUNT ( * ) AS record_count FROM sensor_data_string GROUP BY MONTH ORDER BY MONTH DESC ) d ON C."month" = d."month" LIMIT #{num}

SELECT COALESCE (c.YEAR, d.YEAR ) AS YEAR, COALESCE ( C.record_count, 0 ) + COALESCE ( d.record_count, 0 ) AS record FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR( TIMESTAMP 'epoch' + obs_timestamp * INTERVAL '1 second', 'YYYY' ) AS YEAR, COUNT ( * ) AS record_count FROM sensor_data_float GROUP BY YEAR ORDER BY YEAR DESC ) c FULL JOIN ( SELECT TO_CHAR( TIMESTAMP 'epoch' + obs_timestamp * INTERVAL '1 second', 'YYYY' ) AS YEAR, COUNT ( * ) AS record_count FROM sensor_data_string GROUP BY YEAR ORDER BY YEAR DESC ) d ON c."year" = d."year" LIMIT #{num}

SELECT COALESCE (c.day, d.day ) AS day, COALESCE ( C.record_count, 0 ) + COALESCE ( d.record_count, 0 ) AS record FROM ( SELECT DATE(TO_TIMESTAMP(obs_timestamp)) AS day, COUNT ( * ) AS record_count FROM sensor_data_float GROUP BY day ORDER BY day DESC ) c FULL JOIN ( SELECT DATE(TO_TIMESTAMP(obs_timestamp)) AS day, COUNT ( * ) AS record_count FROM sensor_data_string GROUP BY day ORDER BY day DESC ) d ON c."day" = d."day" LIMIT #{num}
select sum(bytes_size) from sensor_derive_a_quarter where start_time between #{startTime} and #{endTime} -15*60
select sum(bytes_size) from sensor_derive_a_quarter
